title: The State of Himachal Pradesh Act, 1970
full_text: The State of Himachal Pradesh Act, 1970 हिमाचल प्रदेश राज्‍य अधिनियम, 1970 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1970-53 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 1970-12-25 Act Year: 1970 Short Title: The State of Himachal Pradesh Act, 1970 Hindi Title: हिमाचल प्रदेश राज्‍य अधिनियम, 1970 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of the State of Himachal Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 25-12-1970 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 3. THE THIRD SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 4. Amendment of Fourth Schedule to the Constitution. Section 6. Allocation of sitting members. Section 7. Amendment of section 27A of Act 43 of 1950. Section 8. [Omitted.]. Section 9. [Omitted.]. Section 10. Provision as to Legislative Assembly as constituted on the appointed day. Section 11. Duration of Legislative Assembly. Section 12. Speaker and Deputy Speaker. Section 13. Section 27. Form of writs and other processes. Section 28. Powers of Judges. Section 29. Procedure as to appeals to Supreme Court. Section 30. Section 40. Provision relating to certain Services. Section 41. Provisions relating to other services. Show Related Subordinates Section 42. Other provisions as to services. Section 43.
